caption: A man wearing a tall, grey, pointed wig, glasses, and black headphones is recording a podcast. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and a wall adorned with numerous small, framed photographs. The background includes a shelf with a "LEE" branded item. Two logos appear on screen: one says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" with a microphone icon, and another smaller one reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man speaks with varying facial expressions, starting with his mouth open and then shifting to more subtle movements as he continues talking. His body remains mostly stationary, though he slightly adjusts his posture and head position as he speaks into the microphone.
